title: nepenthaceae
intro: The Nepenthaceae rank refers to a family of carnivorous plants, also known as pitcher plants, which obtain essential nutrients by capturing and digesting insects. This family is characterized by its unique, pitcher-shaped leaves that serve as traps to lure and capture prey. Nepenthaceae plants are predominantly found in tropical regions and are known for their adaptation to nutrient-poor soils. With approximately 120 species, this family is a significant group within the world of carnivorous plants.
